list.vod_blurb: A young boy emerges from a coma after a fall down an abandoned mine shaft. His family is confronted
list.vod_content: A young boy emerges from a coma after a fall down an abandoned mine shaft. His family is confronted by dark, threatening spirits and the possibility that the child in their home might no longer be their son.
